sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = f × (Account Size / Largest Loss), where f ≈ 1.03 is derived from maximizing the AHPR/Variance ratio. Requires historical HPR calculations and variance analysis.

source_rule_text: Position size should be adjusted based on the Arithmetic Average HPR (AHPR) and variance to optimize the geometric growth of capital, with optimal sizing occurring at the point where the ratio of AHPR to variance is maximized.
